3197700.name: Corkscrew
3197700.description:
CORKSCREW: THE ONLY GAME OF IT'S KIND.

Have you ever found a game with all of the following:

  • Randomly Generated Level Layouts, for a fresh dynamic game every time you want another round!

  • HD Artstyle, reminiscent of a cartoon or anime, giving a genre that is usually Pixel-Art a lick of fresh paint.

  • Momentum-Based Physics, the player is capable of going as fast as you are willing to make it go! The physics are reminiscent of another game series with a fast main character.

  • Crass Humour, with or without voice acting (#knowingsmile), the expressions and actions of the characters along will be enough to get a giggle or 2 out of you!

CORKSCREW sets you in Rural Britain in the year 2019, where you play as a young 10 year old lad who's work is rudely interrupted by a weird kid from his school to take over his small nation! And getting under the young lad's skin by taking the one thing he loves the most, his Cash! The Player must traverse the levels to not only grab back his cash, but to give this weird kid a right walloping!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
